_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: We found that Nf1 +/− T cells are more hyperproliferative when stimulated with anti-CD3 than their wild-type counterparts
details: Successfully stimulated T cell proliferation in vitro, demonstrating enhanced proliferative response in Nf1+/− T cells compared to wild-type
